_doc: Declarative source of truth for governed RUNTIME AI agents (code under /execution that takes autonomous action in prod). Each entry (1) names the entrypoint the TBI CI gate will require a `<entrypoint>.tbi.json` attestation for, and (2) declares the agent_registry autonomy posture applied at deploy by execution/ops_platform/runtime_agents.upsert_runtime_agents(). Registering live agents is a runtime/deploy action (CLAUDE.md: Claude is not the runtime executor) — this file is the reviewable contract; the upsert runs at deploy.

agents.name: My Day @CB mention auto-responder
agents.rollback_plan: Set OPS_CB_MENTION_POLLING_ENABLED=false to halt immediately; seen.json prevents re-posting; MAX_RESPONSES_PER_TICK (12) bounds blast radius per tick.
agents.notes: Auto-posts a non-binding recommendation comment (plan + confidence); the proposed WORK is human-approved ('Approve to execute'). The low-risk action is the comment itself, bounded by the per-tick circuit breaker. confidence_threshold documents the intended bar for promoting to execution (future phase).

agents.name: My Day auto-pickup (draft-only)
agents.rollback_plan: Disabled by default (OPS_AUTOPICKUP_ENABLED unset); remove the bucket from config/autopickup_allowlist.json to stop drafting on it; draft-only mode never executes side effects; seen-set prevents re-draft.
agents.notes: Phase 1 draft-only: posts a 'proposed next step' with explicit side_effects and confidence; humans approve to execute. Per-project allowlist carries approved_by/approved_at.

agents.name: Advisory session pipeline (AI Transformation Blueprint)
agents.rollback_plan: Unset OPENAI_API_KEY to drop to safe keyword-only defaults; unset ENTERPRISE_WEBHOOK_URL to stop downstream sync; unset GOOGLE_PRIVATE_KEY to stop calendar writes. HARDENING FOLLOW-UP: add a single OPS_ADVISORY_ENABLED kill-switch + access review (public endpoint creates BC projects + fires webhooks).

scope.identity: anonymous web visitor; deliverable gated behind lead capture; downstream webhook HMAC-signed; calendar via scoped service account

agents.notes: User-in-the-loop advisory chatbot (recommend_only): the human drives every step and the output is advice. Representative entrypoint is the recommendation engine; the same posture covers the sibling LLM modules (answer_validator, taxonomy_registry) and generation engines. RESIDUAL RISK (HIGH): public unauthenticated endpoint with downstream side effects and no single kill-switch — tracked as a hardening item.

agents.name: Daily productivity report generator
agents.rollback_plan: Set PRODUCTIVITY_REPORT_DELIVERY=0 (the default) to stop all email; the report still renders to disk. Stop the APScheduler job to halt daily runs.
agents.notes: Fully deterministic (no LLM): aggregates real BC completions, compares post-launch vs pre-launch baseline, renders an HTML/JSON scorecard. Email is autonomous on schedule but OFF BY DEFAULT (PRODUCTIVITY_REPORT_DELIVERY) and to a fixed recipient list — the env flag is the human approval gate.
